evals.prompt: I fixed a null pointer crash in the auth module
evals.expected: A conventional commit message starting with 'fix(auth):' or 'fix:', imperative subject under 72 chars, no period
assertions: Subject line is 72 characters or fewer
Subject does not end with a period

evals.prompt: I renamed the login() function to authenticate() across the whole codebase
evals.expected: A commit message that clearly signals a breaking change
assertions: Message includes 'BREAKING CHANGE' footer or '!' after the type
Message describes what changed, not just that it changed

evals.prompt: Added dark mode support to the settings page
evals.expected: A conventional commit with an appropriate scope like 'settings' or 'ui'
assertions: Message includes a scope in parentheses

evals.prompt: I fixed a null pointer crash in the auth module
evals.expected: A gitmoji commit starting with the bug fix emoji 🐛, imperative subject
assertions: No conventional commit type prefix (fix:, feat:)

evals.prompt: I changed three files — update the user model, fix a typo in README, and add a test
evals.expected: Agent stages files explicitly by name, not with git add . or git add -A
assertions: No 'git add .' or 'git add -A' in response
Each file staged individually or by explicit path

evals.expected: Commit command includes the -S flag for GPG signing
Commit message body includes Co-Authored-By trailers for all co-authors
assertions: Co-Authored-By line is in the commit trailer, not the subject
